01001100000000101011011111111001 - ASI: 18

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 10 * 1
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0010 = 00 * 10
  1001 = 100 * 1
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01001 = 0 * 1001
  10111 = 101 * 11
  00000010 = 0000 * 0010
  01001100 = 01001 * 100
  10110111 = 101 * 10111
  11111001 = 1111 * 1001
  0100110000000010 = 01001100 * 00000010
  1011011111111001 = 10110111 * 11111001
  01001100000000101011011111111001 = 0100110000000010 * 1011011111111001
